title: 9 Effective Herbal Essential Oils for Smokers with Dry Nose
description: Cymbopogon citratus essential oils, also known as lemongrass oil, can help with dry nose due to its decongestant and anti-inflammatory properties. The oil contains constituents like citral, geraniol, and limonene, which have natural expectorant effects, helping to loosen and clear mucus from the nasal passages. This can provide relief from congestion and discomfort associated with dry nose.  To use Cymbopogon citratus essential oils for dry nose, you can add a few drops of the oil to y...
